goals: Store personal study preferences and learning patterns for future reference
Search for previously stored study-related memories to inform current learning
Review all stored memories to see what has been saved about learning habits
Clean up outdated or incorrect memories to keep information accurate

user_agent_config.personality: Curious and organized high school student who wants to track learning patterns and study preferences effectively.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands the concept of storing and retrieving personal preferences but does not know the internal tool names or API details.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored new learning preferences, searched for relevant memories, reviewed all stored information, and removed any outdated entries.
